title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
